# OnlyNative UI — Full API Reference

> Material Design 3 component library for React Native
> Packages: `@onlynative/core`, `@onlynative/components`
> Requirements: React Native 0.81+, React 19+, Expo SDK 54+
> Peer deps: `react-native-safe-area-context >=4`
> Optional peer deps: `@expo/vector-icons >=14` (only needed for icon props)

---

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add @onlynative/core @onlynative/components @expo/vector-icons react-native-safe-area-context
```

---

## @onlynative/core

### MaterialProvider

Wrap your app root to supply the theme to all components.

```tsx
import { MaterialProvider, darkTheme } from '@onlynative/core'

// Light theme (default)
<MaterialProvider>{children}</MaterialProvider>

// Dark theme
<MaterialProvider theme={darkTheme}>{children}</MaterialProvider>

// Custom theme
import { lightTheme } from '@onlynative/core'
import type { Theme } from '@onlynative/core'

const custom: Theme = {
  ...lightTheme,
  colors: { ...lightTheme.colors, primary: '#006A6A', onPrimary: '#FFFFFF' },
}
<MaterialProvider theme={custom}>{children}</MaterialProvider>
```

Props:
- `theme?: Theme` — Theme object. Default: `lightTheme`
- `children: ReactNode`

### useTheme()

Returns the current `Theme` from the nearest `MaterialProvider`.

```tsx
import { useTheme } from '@onlynative/core'

const theme = useTheme()
// theme.colors.primary, theme.typography.bodyMedium, theme.spacing.md, etc.
```

### Theme structure

```
Theme {
  colors: Colors         — 47 MD3 color roles
  typography: Typography — 15 type scale variants (displayLarge..labelSmall)
  shape: Shape           — cornerNone, cornerExtraSmall, cornerSmall, cornerMedium, cornerLarge, cornerExtraLarge, cornerFull
  spacing: Spacing       — xs, sm, md, lg, xl
  elevation: Elevation   — level0..level3 (shadow properties)
  stateLayer: StateLayer — pressedOpacity, focusedOpacity, hoveredOpacity, disabledOpacity
  motion: Motion         — duration and easing tokens
}
```

Colors: primary, onPrimary, primaryContainer, onPrimaryContainer, primaryFixed, onPrimaryFixed, primaryFixedDim, onPrimaryFixedVariant, secondary (same pattern), tertiary (same pattern), error, onError, errorContainer, onErrorContainer, background, onBackground, surface, surfaceDim, surfaceBright, surfaceContainerLowest, surfaceContainerLow, surfaceContainer, surfaceContainerHigh, surfaceContainerHighest, onSurface, surfaceVariant, onSurfaceVariant, outline, outlineVariant, surfaceTint, shadow, scrim, inverseSurface, inverseOnSurface, inversePrimary

Typography variants: displayLarge, displayMedium, displaySmall, headlineLarge, headlineMedium, headlineSmall, titleLarge, titleMedium, titleSmall, bodyLarge, bodyMedium, bodySmall, labelLarge, labelMedium, labelSmall — each with fontFamily, fontSize, fontWeight, lineHeight, letterSpacing

### useBreakpoint()

Returns the current MD3 window size class. Reactively updates on resize.

```tsx
import { useBreakpoint } from '@onlynative/core'

const bp = useBreakpoint()
// 'compact' (0-599) | 'medium' (600-839) | 'expanded' (840-1199) | 'large' (1200-1599) | 'extraLarge' (1600+)
```

### useBreakpointValue(values)

Returns a value based on the current breakpoint with cascade fallback.

```tsx
import { useBreakpointValue } from '@onlynative/core'

const columns = useBreakpointValue({ compact: 1, medium: 2, expanded: 4 })
// compact → 1, medium → 2, expanded/large/extraLarge → 4
```

Type: `useBreakpointValue<T>(values: Partial<Record<Breakpoint, T>> & Record<'compact', T>): T`

---

## @onlynative/components

Import via subpath (preferred): `import { X } from '@onlynative/components/x'`
Import via root: `import { X } from '@onlynative/components'`

### Component override pattern

All interactive components follow a 3-tier override system. Merge order: theme defaults → variant → semantic props → style props (last wins).

Standard override props on interactive components:
- `containerColor?: string` — Root container background. Hover/press state-layer colors auto-derived.
- `contentColor?: string` — Content (label + icons) color. State-layer colors auto-derived.
- `labelStyle?: StyleProp<TextStyle>` — Text-specific overrides (does not affect icons).
- `style` — Root container style.

Disabled state always uses standard MD3 disabled treatment (38% onSurface) regardless of overrides.

---

### Typography

```tsx
import { Typography } from '@onlynative/components/typography'

<Typography variant="headlineMedium" color="#333">Hello</Typography>
```

Props:
- `children: ReactNode` — Content to display
- `variant?: TypographyVariant` — MD3 type scale role. Default: `'bodyMedium'`
  - Values: `'displayLarge' | 'displayMedium' | 'displaySmall' | 'headlineLarge' | 'headlineMedium' | 'headlineSmall' | 'titleLarge' | 'titleMedium' | 'titleSmall' | 'bodyLarge' | 'bodyMedium' | 'bodySmall' | 'labelLarge' | 'labelMedium' | 'labelSmall'`
- `color?: string` — Text color override. Takes priority over `style.color`. Default: theme `onSurface`
- `style?: StyleProp<TextStyle>` — Additional text styles. Merged after typography tokens but before `color`.
- `as?: ComponentType<TextProps>` — Override underlying component (e.g. Animated.Text). Default: `Text`
- Inherits all `TextProps` (except `children`, `style`) — e.g. `numberOfLines`, `adjustsFontSizeToFit`, `selectable`, `ellipsizeMode`

---

### Button

```tsx
import { Button } from '@onlynative/components/button'

<Button variant="filled" leadingIcon="plus" onPress={handlePress}>Create</Button>
<Button variant="outlined">Cancel</Button>
<Button variant="tonal" containerColor="#E8DEF8" contentColor="#1D192B">Custom</Button>
```

Props:
- `children: string` — Button label text
- `variant?: 'filled' | 'elevated' | 'outlined' | 'text' | 'tonal'` — Default: `'filled'`
- `leadingIcon?: string` — MaterialCommunityIcons name before label
- `trailingIcon?: string` — MaterialCommunityIcons name after label
- `iconSize?: number` — Icon size in dp. Default: `18`
- `containerColor?: string` — Background color override (state-layer auto-derived)
- `contentColor?: string` — Label + icon color override
- `labelStyle?: StyleProp<TextStyle>` — Label text style
- `disabled?: boolean`
- Inherits `PressableProps` (except `children`)

---

### IconButton

```tsx
import { IconButton } from '@onlynative/components/icon-button'

<IconButton icon="heart" variant="filled" accessibilityLabel="Like" onPress={handleLike} />
<IconButton icon="heart-outline" selectedIcon="heart" selected={liked} variant="tonal" accessibilityLabel="Like" onPress={toggle} />
```

Props:
- `icon: string` — MaterialCommunityIcons name (required)
- `selectedIcon?: string` — Icon when `selected` is true (toggle mode)
- `iconColor?: string` — Icon color override
- `contentColor?: string` — Content color (takes precedence over `iconColor`)
- `containerColor?: string` — Background color (state-layer auto-derived)
- `variant?: 'filled' | 'tonal' | 'outlined' | 'standard'` — Default: `'filled'`
- `selected?: boolean` — Toggle state
- `size?: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large'` — Default: `'medium'`
- `disabled?: boolean` — Default: `false`
- `accessibilityLabel: string` — Required for a11y
- `onPress?: () => void`
- `style?: PressableProps['style']`

---

### AppBar

```tsx
import { AppBar } from '@onlynative/components/appbar'

<AppBar title="Home" variant="small" />
<AppBar title="Details" canGoBack onBackPress={router.back} insetTop />
<AppBar title="Settings" variant="center-aligned" actions={[
  { icon: 'magnify', accessibilityLabel: 'Search', onPress: onSearch },
  { icon: 'dots-vertical', accessibilityLabel: 'More', onPress: onMore },
]} />
```

Props:
- `title: string` — Title text
- `variant?: 'small' | 'center-aligned' | 'medium' | 'large'` — Default: `'small'`
- `canGoBack?: boolean` — Show back button. Default: `false`
- `onBackPress?: () => void` — Back button handler
- `insetTop?: boolean` — Wrap in SafeAreaView for top inset. Default: `false`
- `elevated?: boolean` — Show elevation/shadow. Default: `false`
- `leading?: ReactNode` — Custom leading content (overrides canGoBack)
- `trailing?: ReactNode` — Custom trailing content (overrides actions)
- `actions?: AppBarAction[]` — Trailing icon actions
  - `AppBarAction: { icon: string, accessibilityLabel: string, onPress?: () => void, disabled?: boolean }`
- `containerColor?: string` — Background color
- `contentColor?: string` — Title + icon color
- `titleStyle?: StyleProp<TextStyle>`
- `style?: StyleProp<ViewStyle>`

---

### Card

```tsx
import { Card } from '@onlynative/components/card'

<Card variant="elevated">{children}</Card>
<Card variant="outlined" onPress={handlePress}>{children}</Card>
```

Props:
- `children: ReactNode`
- `variant?: 'elevated' | 'filled' | 'outlined'` — Default: `'elevated'`
- `onPress?: () => void` — Makes card interactive
- `disabled?: boolean` — Default: `false`
- `containerColor?: string` — Background color (state-layer auto-derived)
- `style` is merged last — any `ViewStyle` property (e.g. `borderRadius`, `padding`) overrides the variant defaults
- Inherits `ViewProps`

---

### Chip

```tsx
import { Chip } from '@onlynative/components/chip'

<Chip variant="assist" leadingIcon="calendar">Today</Chip>
<Chip variant="filter" selected={isSelected} onPress={toggle}>Active</Chip>
<Chip variant="input" avatar={<Avatar />} onClose={handleRemove}>John</Chip>
<Chip variant="suggestion" onPress={handleSuggest}>Try this</Chip>
```

Props:
- `children: string` — Chip label
- `variant?: 'assist' | 'filter' | 'input' | 'suggestion'` — Default: `'assist'`
- `elevated?: boolean` — Use elevated surface. Default: `false`. Ignored on `input`.
- `selected?: boolean` — Selected state (meaningful for `filter` variant)
- `leadingIcon?: string` — MaterialCommunityIcons name
- `iconSize?: number` — Default: `18`
- `avatar?: ReactNode` — Custom avatar (`input` variant only, overrides leadingIcon)
- `onClose?: () => void` — Shows close icon (`input` and selected `filter` only)
- `containerColor?: string` — Background color
- `contentColor?: string` — Label + icon color
- `labelStyle?: StyleProp<TextStyle>`
- Inherits `PressableProps` (except `children`)

---

### Checkbox

```tsx
import { Checkbox } from '@onlynative/components/checkbox'

<Checkbox value={checked} onValueChange={setChecked} />
```

Props:
- `value?: boolean` — Checked state. Default: `false`
- `onValueChange?: (value: boolean) => void`
- `containerColor?: string` — Box color when checked
- `contentColor?: string` — Checkmark color
- `disabled?: boolean`
- Inherits `PressableProps` (except `children`)

---

### Radio

```tsx
import { Radio } from '@onlynative/components/radio'

<Radio value={selected} onValueChange={setSelected} />
```

Props:
- `value?: boolean` — Selected state. Default: `false`
- `onValueChange?: (value: boolean) => void`
- `containerColor?: string` — Ring/dot color when selected
- `contentColor?: string` — Ring color when unselected
- `disabled?: boolean`
- Inherits `PressableProps` (except `children`)

---

### Switch

```tsx
import { Switch } from '@onlynative/components/switch'

<Switch value={on} onValueChange={setOn} />
<Switch value={on} onValueChange={setOn} selectedIcon="check" unselectedIcon="close" />
```

Props:
- `value?: boolean` — Toggle state. Default: `false`
- `onValueChange?: (value: boolean) => void`
- `selectedIcon?: string` — Thumb icon when on. Default: `'check'`
- `unselectedIcon?: string` — Thumb icon when off (enables larger thumb)
- `containerColor?: string` — Track color
- `contentColor?: string` — Thumb + icon color
- `disabled?: boolean`
- Inherits `PressableProps` (except `children`)

---

### TextField

```tsx
import { TextField } from '@onlynative/components/text-field'

<TextField label="Email" variant="outlined" value={email} onChangeText={setEmail} />
<TextField label="Password" variant="filled" error errorText="Required" />
<TextField label="Search" leadingIcon="magnify" trailingIcon="close" onTrailingIconPress={clear} />
```

Props:
- `label?: string` — Floating label text
- `variant?: 'filled' | 'outlined'` — Default: `'filled'`
- `supportingText?: string` — Helper text below field
- `errorText?: string` — Error message (replaces supportingText, sets error state)
- `error?: boolean` — Error styling. Default: `false`
- `disabled?: boolean` — Default: `false`
- `leadingIcon?: string` — MaterialCommunityIcons name
- `trailingIcon?: string` — MaterialCommunityIcons name
- `onTrailingIconPress?: () => void`
- `containerColor?: string` — Background color
- `contentColor?: string` — Input text + icon color
- `inputStyle?: StyleProp<TextStyle>` — Style for the text input element
- Inherits `TextInputProps` (except `placeholderTextColor`, `editable`)

---

### Layout Components

#### Layout

Full-screen safe area wrapper.

```tsx
import { Layout } from '@onlynative/components/layout'

<Layout>{children}</Layout>
<Layout immersive>{/* No safe area insets */}</Layout>
<Layout edges={['top', 'bottom']}>{children}</Layout>
```

Props:
- `children: ReactNode`
- `immersive?: boolean` — Remove all safe area insets. Default: `false`
- `edges?: Edge[]` — Explicit safe-area edges (overrides immersive)
- `style?: StyleProp<ViewStyle>`

#### Box

Base layout primitive with spacing shorthand props.

```tsx
import { Box } from '@onlynative/components/layout'

<Box p="md" bg={theme.colors.surface}>{children}</Box>
<Box px="lg" py="sm" gap="md">{children}</Box>
```

Props (SpacingValue = theme spacing key | number):
- `p?, px?, py?, pt?, pb?, ps?, pe?` — Padding (all, horizontal, vertical, top, bottom, start, end)
- `m?, mx?, my?, mt?, mb?, ms?, me?` — Margin (same pattern)
- `gap?, rowGap?, columnGap?` — Gap between children
- `flex?: number` — Flex value
- `align?: FlexAlignType` — Cross-axis alignment
- `justify?: 'flex-start' | 'flex-end' | 'center' | 'space-between' | 'space-around' | 'space-evenly'`
- `bg?: string` — Background color
- Inherits `ViewProps`

#### Row

Horizontal flex container (extends Box).

```tsx
import { Row } from '@onlynative/components/layout'

<Row gap="sm" align="center">{children}</Row>
<Row wrap>{/* Wraps to next line */}</Row>
```

Additional props:
- `wrap?: boolean` — Default: `false`
- `inverted?: boolean` — row-reverse. Default: `false`

#### Column

Vertical flex container (extends Box).

```tsx
import { Column } from '@onlynative/components/layout'

<Column gap="md">{children}</Column>
```

Additional props:
- `inverted?: boolean` — column-reverse. Default: `false`

#### Grid

Equal-width column grid (extends Row).

```tsx
import { Grid } from '@onlynative/components/layout'

<Grid columns={3} gap="sm">{children}</Grid>
```

Additional props:
- `columns: number` — Required. Number of equal-width columns.

---

### List

```tsx
import { List, ListItem, ListDivider } from '@onlynative/components/list'

<List>
  <ListItem headlineText="Title" supportingText="Subtitle" onPress={handlePress} />
  <ListDivider />
  <ListItem
    headlineText="With Icon"
    leadingContent={<Icon name="star" />}
    trailingContent={<Switch value={on} onValueChange={setOn} />}
  />
</List>
```

#### List

Container for list items.

Props:
- `children: ReactNode`
- `style?: StyleProp<ViewStyle>`
- Inherits `ViewProps`

#### ListItem

Props:
- `headlineText: string` — Primary text (required)
- `supportingText?: string` — Secondary text below headline
- `overlineText?: string` — Text above headline
- `trailingSupportingText?: string` — Trailing text (e.g. timestamp)
- `leadingContent?: ReactNode` — Before text block (icon, avatar, checkbox)
- `trailingContent?: ReactNode` — After text block (icon, switch)
- `onPress?: () => void` — Makes item interactive
- `disabled?: boolean` — Default: `false`
- `containerColor?: string` — Background color (state-layer auto-derived)
- `supportingTextNumberOfLines?: number` — Default: `1`
- `style?: StyleProp<ViewStyle>`
- Inherits `ViewProps`

#### ListDivider

Props:
- `inset?: boolean` — Leading inset (56dp) to align with text after icons. Default: `false`
- `style?: StyleProp<ViewStyle>`
- Inherits `ViewProps`

---

## Icons

All icon props accept `MaterialCommunityIcons` names from `@expo/vector-icons`. Browse available icons at https://pictogrammers.com/library/mdi/.

`@expo/vector-icons` is an optional peer dependency — only install it if you use icon props (`leadingIcon`, `trailingIcon`, `icon`).

---

## Code style

- No semicolons, single quotes, trailing commas
- TypeScript strict mode
- Subpath imports preferred: `@onlynative/components/button` over `@onlynative/components`
